headline: PepsiCo (PEP) Pushes Sustainable Sourcing To 70% With A 90% Goal By 2030
summary: PepsiCo (NasdaqGS:PEP) reports that 70% of its ingredients now come from sustainable sources. The company has updated its environmental goals and is targeting 90% sustainable sourcing by 2030. The revisions include changes to how PepsiCo measures and tracks progress on sourcing and environmental metrics. PepsiCo, a global food and beverage company, is moving further into sustainable sourcing as a core part of its supply chain planning. The latest update on ingredient sourcing speaks to how...

headline: PepsiCo: Dividend King With Double-Digit Total Return Potential
summary: PepsiCo is a relatively recession-proof company with consumer staples products having a strong brand loyalty. Learn why PEP stock is a strong buy.

headline: BASEBALL'S GRADY EMERSON AND SOCCER'S MADDIE DIMARIA NAMED GATORADE BEST PLAYERS OF THE YEAR
summary: Tonight, Gatorade named Grady Emerson and Maddie DiMaria as the 2025-26 Best Male and Best Female Players of the Year, distinguishing the pair as the best high school athletes in the nation. Emerson receives this recognition on the heels of his second overall selection in the 2026 Major League Baseball Draft earlier this week, while DiMaria is committed to play soccer at the University of North Carolina next spring.
